name: PC Deals Weekly Analysis: November 17, 2002
description: Intel's Pentium 4 at 3.06 GHz with Hyper-Threading (HT) technology arrived November 14th. HT adds a trivial number of transitors that add a measurable amount of performance boost for most users. Thus, P4 machines with HT will perform much more crisply than the implied boost from a 200 MHz speed-bump over yesterday's king of the chips, the 2.8 GHz P4.
